title: BeagleNF404's UI Pack
description: An all-in-one UI resource pack. Overhauls containers, HUD, menus, widgets, with mod support, and much more!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9af3635fbedd45151152d768daba51d81321808f.png)
‎ 
‎ [![OptiGUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2b96c3d631be57dacf8eac41ef17c9283772bd1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
‎ ‎ 

![containers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/542b5706a7cc7f998621e38cf9291096ae97c851_0.webp)

- Edited version of [Colourful containers Dark Mode GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui) by [Kingybu](https://modrinth.com/user/Kingybu) 
- Animated saw is made by [vv22003](https://modrinth.com/user/vv22003) for this pack
- Nautilus GUI by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- Numbered hotbars from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) (edited to fit with Dark mode)
- [Brewing Guide](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brewing-guide) by [Kingybu](https://modrinth.com/user/Kingybu)
- Christmas chests by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- Animated written book by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4), original python script by [Vi_Tul](https://modrinth.com/user/Vi_Tul)
- Contains features **from and/or inspired** by [Vi_Tul](https://modrinth.com/user/Vi_Tul)'s [Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui):
  - The chest latches
  - Chipped and damaged anvils
  - Animated redstone in Dropper & Dispenser
  - Haste effect icon
  - Animated flame for furnace, smoker and blast furnace
  - Animated hammer for anvil and smithing table
  - Improved hunger effect icon
  - Animated written book
  


![hud & icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4208f59f374a4077b389485268b70331253ee38d_0.webp)

- Hotbar and green hotbar select from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- Numbered hotbars from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) 
- Coloured ping indicator from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) 
- [Dev's Heart Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack) by [TheOneTrueDev](https://modrinth.com/user/TheOneTrueDev)
- Slightly edited version of [Dev's Better Armor Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-armor-icons) by [TheOneTrueDev](https://modrinth.com/user/TheOneTrueDev)
- Slightly edited version of [Dev's Better Bubbles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-bubbles) by [TheOneTrueDev](https://modrinth.com/user/TheOneTrueDev)
- [Dev's Better Wither Hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-wither-hearts) by [TheOneTrueDev](https://modrinth.com/user/TheOneTrueDev)
- Updated the container for the hunger bar to match with [Dev's Heart Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack) by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4) 


![other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/373944dcb17e2aa9a62412adc89ff1355bf220fe_0.webp)

- Widgets/buttons from [Alternative Dark UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-dark-ui) by [Noxmore](https://modrinth.com/user/Noxmore)
- [Ender Dragon Battle (mode 2)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ender-dragon-battle(mode-2)) by [notandvm](https://modrinth.com/user/notandvm) ♫
- Updated statistic icons by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- [Xaero's Map Frame](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xaeros-map-frame) by [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow)
- Edited version of [Enhanced Banner Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-banner-tooltip) by [railgun](https://modrinth.com/user/railgun)
- Mountain cove panorama remade by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4) ([Original](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gallery-of-panoramas/))
- [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars) by [Naku](https://modrinth.com/user/Naku) (Reduced to vanilla and Wither Storm boss bars only)
- [CWSM Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cwsm-enhanced-boss-bars) by [AmboseTheCat](https://modrinth.com/user/AmboseTheCat)
- Deepslate Options Background from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- Edited version of [Chat+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat+) by [mr_ch0c0late](https://modrinth.com/user/mr_ch0c0late) and [Zartrix](https://modrinth.com/user/Zartrix)
- Edited version of [Icons - Advancements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/advancements) by [mr_ch0c0late](https://modrinth.com/user/mr_ch0c0late) and [Zartrix](https://modrinth.com/user/Zartrix)
- Edited version of [Icons - Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-tooltips) by [mr_ch0c0late](https://modrinth.com/user/mr_ch0c0late) and [Zartrix](https://modrinth.com/user/Zartrix)

![modded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9a17d200212efe20c59c3f9795c1ec7989b4a55.png)

- Some edited versions of containers from [Colourful Containers - Modded Dark Mode GUI Compat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-modded-dark-mode-gui-compat) by [nolyoly_](https://modrinth.com/user/nolyoly_) (aka. Poogy)
  - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) or [Create (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) or [Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)
  - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) or [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
  - [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) (Edited to fit with the mod, instead of the create version)
  - Invtweaks 
  - [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships)
  - [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
  - [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod)
  - [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
  - [Easy magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic)
  - [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)
  - [Echochest](https://modrinth.com/mod/echo-chest)
  - [Nether Chested](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-chested)
- [Easy anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) support by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4) 
- [Animated loading screen - Monochrome logo fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-loading-screen-monochrome-logo-fix) by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- [Dev's Heart Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack) support for [More Heart Types](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-heart-types) by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- [Dev's Heart Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-heart-pack) support for [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- [Alternative Dark UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-dark-ui) support for [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)
- [Alternative Dark UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-dark-ui) support for [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [me (BeagleNF404)](https://modrinth.com/user/BeagleNF4O4)

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

**Q: What is BeagleNF404's UI pack?**

A: BeagleNF404's UI pack is my all in one GUI resourcepack. Changing things from buttons to containers to even HUDs and much more!

**Q: Did you even get approval to make this pack?**

A: Of course! Every single creator has been personally asked for approval.

**Q: How long did this pack take? (for v1.0)**

A: Roughly 4 months.

**Q: Will the pack keep getting updates?**

A: Yes, Although the pack will mainly get support specific versions [For more information look in INFO]. But generally the major version should be supported.

**Q: Is this basically a modpack but for resourcepacks?**

A: Yes. (But with edited textures)

**Q: Did you even add stuff yourself?**

A: Yes I did, from modded support to changing nearly every texture and various other things.

**Q: How did this project start??**

A: As a simple fork of Colourful Containers, that changed a few things.

**Q: Can I recommend features/mods?**

A: Yes! You can do it in in the [github](https://github.com/BeagleNF404/BeagleNF404s_packs). Make sure to put in the title that its for 'BeagleNF404's UI Pack'.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
  
With this rescource pack, **_YOU MAY_**:

- Include 'BeagleNF404's UI Pack' in your modpack (preferably with credit)
- Modify for _**personal**_ use
  
With this resource pack, **_YOU MAY NOT_**:


- Redistribute this resource pack
- Redistribute parts of this resourcepack



</details>
